description: NAVAID checkpoint data from the FAA NASR 28-day subscription. Contains air and ground checkpoints for verifying NAVAID accuracy.

EFF_DATE.description: The 28 Day NASR Subscription Effective Date (YYYY/MM/DD).

NAV_ID.description: NAVAID Facility Identifier (key column for joining to NAV_BASE).

NAV_TYPE.description: NAVAID Facility Type (key column for joining to NAV_BASE).

STATE_CODE.description: Associated State Post Office Code (common column).

CITY.description: Associated City Name (key column for joining to NAV_BASE).

COUNTRY_CODE.description: Country Post Office Code (key column for joining to NAV_BASE).

ALTITUDE.description: Altitude only when checkpoint is in air.

AIR_GND_CODE.description: Air/Ground Code: A=AIR, G=GROUND, G1=GROUND ONE.

CHK_DESC.description: Narrative description associated with the checkpoint.

ARPT_ID.description: Airport ID associated with the checkpoint.

STATE_CHK_CODE.description: State code in which associated city is located.
